message:
🌱 longhorn: [IMPROVEMENT] Introduce Concurrent Job Limit for Snapshot Operations (#1253)

* 🌱 Add longhorn: [IMPROVEMENT] Introduce Concurrent Job Limit for Snapshot mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct longhorn namespace to longhorn-system

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

Community-requested feature.", + "type": "feature", + "status": "completed", + "steps": [ + { + "title": "Check current longhorn deployment", + "description": "Verify your longhorn version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n longhorn-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn\nhelm list -n longhorn-system 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working longhorn installation." + }, + { + "title": "Review longhorn configuration", + "description": "Inspect the relevant longhorn configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n longhorn-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn\nkubectl get configmap -n longhorn-system -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=longhorn\n```\n### Is your improvement request related to a feature? Please describe (👍 if you like this request)\n\nSome snapshot operations may trigger a merge process that temporarily consumes additional storage space, increasing the risk of disk exhaustion." + }, + { + "title": "Apply the fix for [IMPROVEMENT] Introduce Concurrent Job Limit for Snapshot…", + "description": "#### Additional documentation or context\n```yaml\n- Take `snapshot 3`\n5. Remove the snapshot `snapshot 2` -> trigger snapshot purge\n6. During the snapshot deletion, try to execute snapshot purge manually\n\n\n```" + }, + { + "title": "Verify the feature works", + "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n longhorn-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn\nkubectl get events -n longhorn-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[IMPROVEMENT] Introduce Concurrent Job Limit for Snapshot…\" is functioning correctly." + } + ], + "resolution": { + "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/pull/12204", + "codeSnippets": [ + "- Take `snapshot 3`\n5. Remove the snapshot `snapshot 2` -> trigger snapshot purge\n6. During the snapshot deletion, try to execute snapshot purge manually\n\n", + "it fails with an error:" + ] + } + }, + "metadata": { + "tags": [ + "longhorn", + "incubating", + "storage", + "feature" + ], + "cncfProjects": [ + "longhorn" + ], + "targetResourceKinds": [], + "difficulty": "intermediate", + "issueTypes": [ + "feature" + ], + "maturity": "incubating", + "sourceUrls": { + "issue": "https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/issues/11635", + "repo": "https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn", + "pr": "https://github.com/longhorn/longhorn/pull/12204" + }, + "reactions": 4, + "comments": 15, + "synthesizedBy": "copilot" + }, + "prerequisites": { + "kubernetes": ">=1.24", + "tools": [ + "kubectl" + ], + "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with longhorn installed or the issue environment reproducible." + }, + "security": { + "scannedAt": "2026-03-16T06:44:15.250Z", + "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0", + "sanitized": true, + "findings": [] + } +}
